suspicious_activity.narrative: Jacqueline Rodriguez (CUST_0111) engaged in suspicious activity in 2025. Multiple large transactions, including frequent wire transfers, were observed. Notably, on 2025-07-29, a wire transfer credit of $76,517.25 was received, followed by four large wire transfer debits totaling $49,517.51 within two days. This pattern may indicate attempts to obscure the origin of funds.
